title: Redistricting debate shifts to South Carolina as Republicans seek clean sweep of House seats – US politics live
summary_full: GOP to target seat held by Jim Clyburn, the only Democrat among the state’s seven representatives in the HouseSign up for the Breaking News US emailTaiwan would “welcome” an opportunity for its leader to speak to US president Donald Trump after he raised the possibility, a senior Taiwanese diplomat said on Monday.Trump told reporters on Friday that he had to speak to the man “running Taiwan” – an apparent reference to president Lai Ching-te – about arms sales.
